## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between NBD and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 articles launched last week, 10 more being uploaded now (30 total new articles)](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Initial performance: 1.3k impressions, 4 clicks; all 20 articles now indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [40 new topics coming; Andrej to send for review by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team aims for 5-10x traffic growth by end of next month](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [NBD team considering contributing their own blog content](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [20 articles launched last week](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [10 more articles being uploaded post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Workflow adjustments caused slight delays, prioritizing quality over speed](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [18 remaining topics from initial batch; 40 new topics in development](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [1.3k total impressions (≈1/7 of site's monthly traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [4 clicks: 3 for "logo design best practices", 1 for "website navigation best practices"](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [All 20 articles now indexed by Google (up from 3 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Sitemap issue resolved, improving Google crawling](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [Andrej to send 40 new topics for review by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Plan to build content clusters around successful topics (e.g., logo design)](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Exploring content enrichment: images, infographics, illustrations, videos](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Future discussions on CTAs, sidebar widgets, lead magnets, gated content](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### Success Metrics & Goals

  - [Aiming for 5-10x traffic growth by end of next month](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Considering overall website traffic, domain authority in goal-setting](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Focus on consistent content production and publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Doubling down on high-performing topics](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Collaboration & Promotion

  - [Eli offered to promote FWD.digital's successes when notable milestones are reached](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Beatriz exploring option for NBD team members to contribute blog content](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Andrej offered support in creating outlines/briefs for NBD team contributions](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to upload remaining 10 articles and send 40 new topics by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Andrej to update performance tab with ranking keywords](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Beatriz to discuss potential blog contributions with NBD team](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance and adjusting strategy accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Explore content enrichment options in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/v6CAv9e-RwW3qABF6qNKWNzdBcJMCbzH?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
